# zabbix_media_type (Data Source)

Fetches a Zabbix media type by `id` or `name`. Exactly one of `id` or `name` must be provided.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a media type by ID
data "zabbix_media_type" "by_id" {
  id = "10"
}

# Look up a media type by name
data "zabbix_media_type" "by_name" {
  name = "Email alerts"
}

output "media_type_id" {
  value = data.zabbix_media_type.by_name.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the media type. One of `id` or `name` must be set.
- `name` (String) Display name of the media type. One of `id` or `name` must be set.

### Read-Only

- `attempt_interval` (String) Interval between delivery attempts.
- `description` (String) Description of the media type.
- `email_settings` (Attributes) Email-specific settings. Populated when `type` is `email`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--email_settings))
- `max_attempts` (Number) Maximum number of delivery attempts.
- `max_sessions` (Number) Maximum number of concurrent sessions.
- `message_templates` (Attributes List) Per-event-source notification templates. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--message_templates))
- `script_settings` (Attributes) Script-specific settings. Populated when `type` is `script`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--script_settings))
- `sms_settings` (Attributes) SMS-specific settings. Populated when `type` is `sms`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sms_settings))
- `status` (String) Whether the media type is active: `enabled` or `disabled`.
- `type` (String) Media type channel: `email`, `sms`, `script`, or `webhook`.
- `webhook_settings` (Attributes) Webhook-specific settings. Populated when `type` is `webhook`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--webhook_settings))

<a id="nestedatt--email_settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `email_settings`

Read-Only:

- `content_type` (String) Email content type.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) SMTP authentication password. Always empty — the API does not return passwords.
- `smtp_authentication` (String) SMTP authentication method.
- `smtp_email` (String) From address for outgoing email.
- `smtp_helo` (String) SMTP HELO/EHLO hostname.
- `smtp_port` (Number) SMTP server port.
- `smtp_security` (String) SMTP connection security.
- `smtp_server` (String) SMTP server address.
- `username` (String) SMTP authentication username.


<a id="nestedatt--message_templates"></a>
### Nested Schema for `message_templates`

Read-Only:

- `eventsource` (Number) Event source type.
- `message` (String) Message body.
- `recovery` (Number) Recovery type.
- `subject` (String) Message subject.


<a id="nestedatt--script_settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `script_settings`

Read-Only:

- `exec_params` (String) Script parameters.
- `exec_path` (String) Path to the script on the Zabbix server.


<a id="nestedatt--sms_settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sms_settings`

Read-Only:

- `gsm_modem` (String) Serial device path of the GSM modem.


<a id="nestedatt--webhook_settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `webhook_settings`

Read-Only:

- `event_menu_name` (String) Label for the event menu entry.
- `event_menu_url` (String) URL for the event menu entry.
- `parameters` (Attributes List) Key/value pairs passed to the webhook script. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--webhook_settings--parameters))
- `process_tags` (Boolean) Whether to process event tags from the webhook response.
- `script` (String) JavaScript body of the webhook.
- `show_event_menu` (Boolean) Whether to add a link to the event menu.
- `timeout` (String) Script execution timeout.

<a id="nestedatt--webhook_settings--parameters"></a>
### Nested Schema for `webhook_settings.parameters`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) Parameter name.
- `value` (String, Sensitive) Parameter value. Always empty — the API does not return sensitive values.
